items.title: Editor Full Add-on

items.title: Script Box
items.description: A simple project for experimenting with script.

items.title: Editor Script Box
items.description: A basic starter project for editing Editor add-on projects.

items.title: Solid Cube Block Starter
items.description: This is a simple solid unit cube block.

items.title: Crate Starter Block
items.description: The crate starter block is an example of a simple block with a custom model.

items.title: Solid Cube Dice Block
items.description: The dice block is a simple solid cube.

items.title: Sushi Block
items.description: The sushi roll block is an example of a simple block with a custom model.

items.title: Block with Custom State
items.description: The fish bowl is a simple block with custom state.

items.title: Simple Food (Biscuit)
items.description: A starter example of a simple food item (a hard biscuit).

items.title: Simple Food (Pear)
items.description: A starter example of a simple food item (a pear).

items.title: Simple Drink (Elixir)
items.description: A starter example of a simple drink item (an elixir).

items.title: Simple Tool (Rod)
items.description: A starter example of a simple tool item (a rod).

items.title: Simple Item (Key)
items.description: A starter example of a simple item (a key).

items.title: Custom sword
items.description: A custom sword item that uses an icon for the model.

items.title: Custom Wrench
items.description: A custom wrench with a custom geometry.

items.title: Test that Entity is Feather Item
Give player a place-restricted gold block
Give player a sword with custom lore
A message that displays a scoreboard score using a wildcard
Update a signs existing sign text
Tests a roller coaster obstacle course.
A simple mob test - the fox should attack the chicken.
Allay
items.description: The allay is a new befriend-able flying mob that loves to collect things.

items.title: Axolotl
items.description: Create a new animal based on the Minecraft axolotl.

items.title: Cat
items.description: Cats are commonly found in well-populated villages. To tame a stray cat, you'll need to slowly approach it while holding something tasty.

items.title: Cow
items.description: The cow can be found mooing about in grassy areas. It is very resourceful and makes for a great cattle companion.

items.title: Creeper
items.description: The creeper is a mob that can sneak up on you when you least expect it and trigger a devastating attack by blowing up.

items.title: Enderman
items.description: The tall and mysterious Enderman is a neutral mob that can be seen during late nights, standing in the distance while staring blindly into the horizon before teleporting away.

items.title: Rabbit
items.description: Create a new animal based on the Minecraft rabbit.

items.title: Pig
items.description: A pig is a reliable oink friend. With the right equipment (a saddle), you can even use it as a mount and take it for a ride.

items.title: Sheep
items.description: Sheep can provide you with wool, which is a useful material in many crafting recipes and can be dyed into different colors.

items.title: Skeleton
items.description: With bow and arrow, the skeleton fires arrows at players from a distance. They spawn during the night and in poorly lit areas such as caves.

items.title: Wolf
items.description: Create a new animal based on the Minecraft wolf.

items.title: Zombie
items.description: The groaning zombie is persistent at chasing players, and also quite slow.

items.title: Starter GameTest
items.description: A simple introduction to creating GameTests. See the tutorial at https://aka.ms/newgametest.

items.title: Basic GameTest
items.description: A collection of GameTests focused on exploring different facets of Mob Behavior.

items.title: Spawn Rule
items.description: Will automatically create new entities in the world based on a set of rules

items.title: Loot Table
items.description: Determines a set of items to randomly generate, typically in response a block being broken, an entity being no more, or when randomly generating chests.

items.title: Recipe (Shapeless)
items.description: Used to define how a player can create new items from a set of existing items - without a need for a specific arrangement

items.title: Recipe (Shaped)
items.description: Used to define how a player can create new items from a set of existing items - with items arranged in particular patterns

items.title: Feature + Rule
items.description: Defines a hierarchy of features that can be used to generate structures and other in-game random assemblages of blocks

items.title: Jigsaw Structure Set
items.description: Defines a randomly building collection of structures

items.title: Atmospherics
items.description: Defines atmospherics files

items.title: Color grading
items.description: Color grading

items.title: Partial Biome
items.description: Defines a biome replacement

items.title: Passive Quadruped (Wizard)
items.description: A simple passive four-legged animal with breeding and leashing support.

items.title: Hostile Humanoid (Wizard)
items.description: A hostile two-legged mob with melee attacks and undead properties.

items.title: Neutral Wolf-like (Wizard)
items.description: A neutral animal that can be tamed and attacks when provoked.

items.title: Flying Creature (Wizard)
items.description: A passive flying creature like a bat.

items.title: Aquatic Fish (Wizard)
items.description: A passive water-dwelling creature.

items.title: Spider-like Arthropod (Wizard)
items.description: A hostile spider-like creature with wall climbing.

items.title: Slime Creature (Wizard)
items.description: A bouncy hostile slime that splits when killed.

items.title: Boss Entity (Wizard)
items.description: A powerful boss mob with multiple attack types and phases.

items.description: A simple solid cube block with stone properties.

items.title: Wood Planks Block (Wizard)
items.description: Wooden plank block with flammable properties.

items.title: Light Block (Wizard)
items.description: A block that emits light.

items.title: Container Block (Wizard)
items.description: A block that stores items like a chest.

items.title: Door Block (Wizard)
items.description: An openable door block.

items.title: Glass Block (Wizard)
items.description: A transparent passable block.

items.title: Crafting Station (Wizard)
items.description: A block for crafting items.

items.title: Slab Block (Wizard)
items.description: A half-height block with top/bottom placement.

items.title: Stairs Block (Wizard)
items.description: A stair-shaped block with directional placement.

items.title: Ore Block (Wizard)
items.description: A mineable ore block with sparkle effects.

items.title: Iron Sword (Wizard)
items.description: A standard melee weapon with durability.

items.title: Gold Sword (Wizard)
items.description: A fast but fragile enchanted sword.

items.title: Iron Pickaxe (Wizard)
items.description: A mining tool for stone and ores.

items.title: Basic Food (Wizard)
items.description: A simple food item that restores hunger.

items.title: Healing Potion (Wizard)
items.description: A drinkable healing item.

items.title: Helmet (Wizard)
items.description: Head armor piece with protection.

items.title: Chestplate (Wizard)
items.description: Chest armor piece with high protection.

items.title: Throwable Item (Wizard)
items.description: An item that can be thrown as a projectile.

items.title: Music Disc (Wizard)
items.description: A playable music disc for jukeboxes.

items.title: Fuel Item (Wizard)
items.description: An item that can be used as furnace fuel.

items.title: Humanoid Mob Template
items.description: A humanoid mob template with head, body, arms, and legs. 32 units tall (~2 blocks, player-scale).

items.title: Small Animal Template
items.description: A small quadruped like a pig or sheep (~14 units tall, ~1 block).

items.title: Large Animal Template
items.description: A larger quadruped like a horse or cow (~24 units tall, ~1.5 blocks).

items.title: Vehicle Template
items.description: A wheeled vehicle or machine (~48 units long, ~3 blocks).

items.title: Bird Template
items.description: A bipedal bird with wings and beak (~12 units tall, ~0.75 blocks).

items.title: Insect Template
items.description: An 8-legged spider/insect (~14 units tall, ~38 units wide with legs).

items.title: Flying Creature Template
items.description: A flying creature with articulated wings (~44 units wingspan, ~2.75 blocks).

items.title: Fish Template
items.description: An aquatic fish with fins (~6 units long, ~0.4 blocks).

items.title: Slime Creature Template
items.description: A simple bouncy cube creature (~6 units, great for beginners).

items.title: Wizard Template
items.description: A magical spellcaster with robes and staff.

items.title: Golem Template
items.description: A large stone or iron construct.

items.title: Fox Template
items.description: A small fox with detailed fur and tail.

items.description: A crystalline creature or object.

items.description: A colorful tropical fish with fancy fins.

items.title: Robot Template
items.description: A mechanical robot with joints and panels.

items.title: Mushroom Creature Template
items.description: A mushroom-based creature or mob.
